archetype: Organic & Earthy with Vibrant Spice Accents and Swiss/Editorial Structure

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#1A1A1A]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Editorial Grid/Zine style. High contrast structural lines with generous internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Solid 1px #1A1A1A borders for structural grid appearance. Use border-collapse patterns.

buttons.primary: bg-[#386641] text-white hover:bg-[#2B4F32] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-['Outfit'] font-bold tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-[#F8F6F0] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-['Outfit'] font-bold tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.tags: bg-[#E9C46A] text-[#1A1A1A] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-['Outfit'] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

cards.recipe_card: bg-white border border-[#1A1A1A] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#1A1A1A] group

navigation.style: Sticky top, bg-[#F8F6F0]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1A1A1A] z-50

hero_image.description: Modern Indian dish plated beautifully on a table, representing experimental Indian food. Use in hero section.

recipe_placeholder_1.description: Spooning sauce over a dish. Use for recipe list or step-by-step detail.

recipe_placeholder_2.description: Dish with edible flowers. Perfect for experimental dessert recipe.

texture_bg.description: Brown powder/spice in glass bowl flat lay. Use for category headers or subtle backgrounds.

recipe_placeholder_3.description: Sliced cucumber on white ceramic plate. Use for fresh experimental salads.

media.image_constraints: Use aspect-square or aspect-[4/5] for recipe cards with object-cover. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must transition clearly. Cards should use the brutalist solid shadow on hover (-translate-y-1, shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#1A1A1A]).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for staggered list entrance on recipe cards. Ensure prefers-reduced-motion is respected.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, links MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role (e.g. data-testid='recipe-search-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a colourful, experimental Indian food blog.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' via Google Fonts for headings, 'Outfit' for UI/Subheadings, and 'Manrope' for body.
Install and use lenis for smooth scrolling.
Install and use framer-motion for staggering recipe cards and page transitions.
Adopt an 'Editorial Zine' layout. Use border-collapse and 1px black borders around major sections and cards to create a structural, encyclopedia-like look.
The Hero section should have massive typography and an overlapping or full-bleed image. Do NOT use standard center-aligned generic layout.
Integrate Shadcn UI elements for Admin Login, Search, and Recipe Forms, but strip their default rounded styles to match the 'rounded-none' brutalist/editorial aesthetic.
For the recipe detail page, use a split layout if possible: Sticky ingredients on the left, steps on the right.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as requested.
